summary: Phase 2 testing (Patents, Datasets, Workspaces, Stripe Billing, Google Auth). All targeted backend endpoints and frontend UI flows passed. No regressions seen.
passed: POST /api/workspaces created workspace with owner member
POST /api/workspaces/{id}/invite added 2nd registered user as editor
POST /api/patents/analyze returned 403 for free user (Pro gated)
POST /api/patents/search returned 403 for free, then 200 with results[{title,number,assignee,year,abstract,relevance}] after tier->pro in Mongo
POST /api/datasets/search returned 403 for free, then 200 with 6 HuggingFace results including name/url/downloads/likes/tags
POST /api/billing/checkout-session returned valid checkout.stripe.com URL + session_id (cs_test_...)
POST /api/webhook/stripe handled invalid signature gracefully (HTTP 400, no crash)
Frontend login flow works; sidebar shows Patents/Datasets/Workspaces/Upgrade
Workspaces UI: created 'UI WS Test' via ws-name + ws-create, appears in list
Patents page: both tabs (analyze, search) render with testids
Pro gating UX: free user clicking Patents search was redirected to /app/billing as expected
Datasets page: datasets-input, datasets-search, src-huggingface all render
Billing page: $29/mo Pro plan visible with upgrade-btn
notes: Stripe checkout URL navigation (clicking Upgrade -> Stripe checkout) not E2E clicked to avoid leaving the app domain, but backend confirms valid checkout URL is generated. Idempotent tier upgrade via /billing/status requires a real 'paid' status from Stripe which can't be simulated without real card flow; logic in code is correct (checks already_paid before updating tier).
